filename: scRNAseq sample tumor purity QC + organoid embedding protocol.docx
relative_path: Protocols, instructions/scRNAseq/scRNAseq sample tumor purity QC + organoid embedding protocol.docx
full_text:
Thaw one vial per patient

Centrifuge 500 g 2 min, remove freezing medium. Resuspend in 1 ml of M1

Count cells with Trypan Blue

Take 1M (or less, if the vial contains only a few cells) cells aside for organoid establishment if sample has not had organoid establishment attempted previously

If the vial contains a large excess of cells in comparison to what is needed - 1 M cells for organoids + ~0.2 M cells for cytospin - refreeze the rest of the vial immediately to preserve the samples

Assess extent of clustering via counting slides or EVOS

Collect at least 0.15 M cells aside for cytospinning on slides before TrypLE incubation

Centrifuge 500 g 2 min, aspirate medium. Add TrypLE and incubate in +37 for 5-15 minutes depending on cluster sizes of cells in the sample

Centrifuge 500 g 2 min, remove TrypLE. Resuspend in 1 ml of M1

Count cells with Trypan Blue, observe whether viability has dropped during TrypLE treatment, and if the TrypLE treatment dissociated the cell clusters

Cytospin ~70 000 cells per slide by centrifuging 1300 rpm 5 min (BOTH TRYPLE-TREATED AND UNTREATED), then fix 15’ in RT with 4 % PFA-PBS. Wash thrice with PBS and continue directly to 2D IF staining
